title.en: China-to-India Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入印度：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入印度：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China wireless and IoT device documentation against India market-access requirements, covering WPC/SACFA radio approval, Equipment Type Approval (ETA), BIS CRS safety under IS 13252, TEC telecom certification, and import routing through WPC ETA.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国无线及物联网设备文件与印度市场准入要求的差距对照，涵盖WPC/SACFA无线电批准、设备型号批准（ETA）、依据IS 13252的BIS CRS安全要求、TEC电信认证及通过WPC ETA进行进口。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國無線及物聯網裝置文件與印度市場准入要求的差距對照，涵蓋WPC/SACFA無線電批准、設備型號批准（ETA）、依據IS 13252的BIS CRS安全要求、TEC電信認證及透過WPC ETA進行進口。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, WPC/SACFA clearance, BIS registration, TEC certificate, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Indian law, notified product lists, licence conditions, and applicable standards with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、WPC/SACFA批准、BIS注册、TEC证书、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行印度法律、公告产品目录、许可条件及适用标准。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、WPC/SACFA批准、BIS註冊、TEC證書、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行印度法律、公告產品目錄、許可條件及適用標準。

answer_first.en: The main India gaps for a China-origin wireless/IoT device are WPC Equipment Type Approval (ETA) for de-licensed radio modules, WPC/SACFA clearance where licensed spectrum or fixed radio sites are involved, BIS CRS registration for notified electronics tested to IS 13252 (Part 1), TEC/MTCTE certification for notified telecom equipment, and import routing through WPC ETA or applicable WPC import permissions. Chinese SRRC and CCC documents do not substitute for Indian approvals.
answer_first.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入印度的主要差距包括：免许可频段无线模块的WPC设备型号批准（ETA）；涉及许可频谱或固定无线电站点时的WPC/SACFA批准；公告电子产品依据IS 13252（第1部分）进行测试并取得BIS CRS注册；公告电信设备取得TEC/MTCTE认证；以及通过WPC ETA或适用WPC进口许可完成进口。中国SRRC和CCC文件不能替代印度批准。
answer_first.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入印度的主要差距包括：免許可頻段無線模組的WPC設備型號批准（ETA）；涉及許可頻譜或固定無線電站點時的WPC/SACFA批准；公告電子產品依據IS 13252（第1部分）進行測試並取得BIS CRS註冊；公告電信設備取得TEC/MTCTE認證；以及透過WPC ETA或適用WPC進口許可完成進口。中國SRRC和CCC文件不能取代印度批准。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
